raw.transcript: [{"timestamp":1965170,"mark_type":2,"mark_type_string":null,"mark_content":"Iwatani 製コンロの直火を利用し、ガラス製のシリンダー内でコーヒー豆を焙煎する自家製セットアップを示しています。","content":null,"title":null,"expanded_content":null,"picture_link":"permanent/6a96f9e9f528462da5eceab0567a9512/mark/20260426_134714_7a58e9f0.jpg","mark_id":"cc90046a1b466354324bf8703459b3d3","ocr_data_link":"highlight/ocr_data/ocr_20260426134715-mark@6df7d0d6626ce9d5aa730f.txt","link_expire_timestamp":null,"picture_local_path":"plaud_images/note_recording_session_1777209262_1965170.jpg","picture_full_url":null,"is_user_edited":false,"mark_status":3,"error_message":null,"retry_count":null,"last_failed_time":null,"is_user_deleted":null},{"timestamp":1974982,"mark_type":2,"mark_type_string":null,"mark_content":"これは神戸の「MAMEYA」による「カリビアン クイーン」という銘柄のコーヒー豆で、消費者の好みに応じた焙煎度合いや挽き方を選択可能です。","content":null,"title":null,"expanded_content":null,"picture_link":"permanent/6a96f9e9f528462da5eceab0567a9512/mark/20260426_134732_00f637e2.jpg","mark_id":"fc97f8c45a22fc0294c510b79d0488d8","ocr_data_link":"highlight/ocr_data/ocr_20260426134733-mark@08efd3a608885364de1def.txt","link_expire_timestamp":null,"picture_local_path":"plaud_images/note_recording_session_1777209262_1974982.jpg","picture_full_url":null,"is_user_edited":false,"mark_status":3,"error_message":null,"retry_count":null,"last_failed_time":null,"is_user_deleted":null}]
